component.name: Live Session
component.description: **Open:** `Foundation/Border/Default` panel (391×260), **Brand/Accent** 6px top rule, dual shadow, **Active Session** (`Typography/LABEL` + **Foundation/Text/Muted**), PT Serif **24 Bold** white title, centered **70px** mono timer (white, uppercase), collapse control (white chevron). **Minimized:** 359px-wide bar, **16** radius, `1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)` border, deeper shadow, dot + label stack + **Typography/Body-Bold** title in muted, **Brand/Primary** **Typography/Metric** timer + chevron up.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: live-session (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.openContent: live-session-open-content (React wrapper; Figma omits — rail + rows are siblings)
figmaLayerNames.openTopRow: live-session-open-top-row (React; Figma uses absolute-position collapse control)
figmaLayerNames.minimizedToggleIcon: live-session-minimized-toggle-icon (chevron frame; tap target may be the parent row in Figma)

typography: Typography/Heading-H2 (in code as local PT Serif 24)

codeProps.timerOpen: string; large display in open state
codeProps.timerMinimized: optional; strip timer when minimized (defaults to timerOpen)

notes: 2026-04-10: Added kebab-case `live-session-*` structural hooks in TSX and spec.
2026-04-08: `LiveSessionCard` from Figma `1287:1545`. Chevrons are inline SVG (white); raster assets not used.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `1287:1545` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Open Header: `live-session-open-rail`, `live-session-open-toggle` (+ `live-session-open-toggle-icon`), `live-session-open-status` (+ dot, label wrap/label), `live-session-open-title` (+ text), `live-session-open-timer-wrap` / `live-session-open-timer` (+ timer text). Minimized: `live-session-minimized-main` (+ dot, copy column with label/title wraps), `live-session-minimized-actions` (timer + `live-session-minimized-toggle-icon`). React adds `live-session-open-content` / top-row flex and dot/timer text hooks. No `flatten()` in automation.
